reviews.comment:
Sorprendido! Vengo al Full del ACA y consumo un café doble todos los días. Me acabo de enterar que completé el límite de puntos a sumar...raaarooo. Ecuación: a mayor consumo, menos puntos sumás...
Por otra parte, me parece abusivo que cuenten solo con 2 empleados, uno cobra y hace cafe y otro se ocupa de la cocina, además con mucho público que sale del teatro. Algunos se van sin consumir. Estaría bueno proteger más al personal que pone todo el esmero y cordialidad para brindar un buen servicio. Una pena!!!

(Translated by Google)
Surprised! I come to the ACA Full and have a double coffee every day. I just found out I've reached the points limit... weird. Equation: the more you spend, the fewer points you earn... On another note, I think it's outrageous that they only have two employees: one takes payments and makes coffee, and the other runs the kitchen, especially with so many people leaving the theater. Some even leave without ordering anything. It would be great to better protect the staff who put in so much effort and friendliness to provide good service. What a shame!
